raw_consumer_statement: I had a dispute with merchant simply thai for {$5.00} as the merchant gave me the wrong order as I was driving back to XXXX from XXXX XXXX  and this merchant was on my in XXXX. When I got home I found they gave the wrong soup than what i had ordered so i called the merchant and they refused to refund me. I answered all the questions thrice to the jetblue disputes team and then dispute was closed in the merchant 's favor which I dont agree at all. I need my money back as the merchant was at fault.
